Header.scrollingText: NOW ALL DESSERTS AND SIDES ARE €6,50

Hero.title: SIX2GO
Hero.description: Order what you want, when you want. Delivered to you.

AboutSection.title: About six2go
AboutSection.description: six2go's food was dreamed by many but never created until now. We are a small team of food lovers who are passionate about food and we are here to bring you the best food experience you have ever had and will ever have.

AboutPage.title: About six2go
AboutPage.storyP1: six2go started with a simple idea: world-class food, delivered to your door, at prices that won't empty your wallet. Our Michelin-star chefs craft every dish with love, drawing inspiration from cuisines across the globe — from Italian wood-fired pizzas to Japanese-inspired desserts.
AboutPage.storyP2: What began as a small kitchen experiment has grown into a brand trusted by food lovers everywhere. We believe great food creates stories, and every plate we serve is a new chapter.
AboutPage.missionP: To make restaurant-quality meals accessible to everyone — whether you're feeding a family of six or grabbing a quick solo bite. Fresh ingredients, fast delivery, zero compromises.
AboutPage.howStep1: Browse our menu and pick your favourites.
AboutPage.howStep2: Add them to your cart and head to checkout.
AboutPage.howStep3: Pay securely online — we handle the rest.
AboutPage.howStep4: Sit back and wait for Max to deliver your order at top speed.
AboutPage.whyPoint1: Dishes from 6+ cuisines around the world.
AboutPage.whyPoint2: Prices starting from just a few euros.
AboutPage.whyPoint3: Delivery powered by an actual Formula 1 driver (okay, maybe not literally).
AboutPage.whyPoint4: No subscription — order when you want, how you want.

TopChoices.title: Our top choices
TopChoices.description: Our chef's top supurb choices for you. From signature techniques to locally sourced treasures, our chef has narrowed down the menu to these superb essentials that define our culinary philosophy.

Faq.title: FAQ
Faq.q1: What areas do you deliver to?
Faq.a1: We currently deliver across the Netherlands and are expanding to more EU countries soon.
Faq.a2: Most orders arrive within 30–45 minutes. Max drives fast.
Faq.q3: Can I cancel or change my order?
Faq.a3: You can modify your order within 5 minutes of placing it. After that, the kitchen is already on it.
Faq.a4: Nope. Even a single dessert counts — we don't judge.
Faq.a5: Drop us an email at jayklav62@gmail.com or call (+31) 0633376647. We're here to help.

Cards.card1Desc: Cheap and all around the world food options.
Cards.card2Desc: 100% we got Max Verstappen as our driver.
Cards.card3Title: Why would I ever order from here?
Cards.card3Desc: everyone loves food and wants to meet Max right?

Menu.title: Our dishes

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: This is a placeholder privacy policy. SIX2GO respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data.
Privacy.collectText: We may collect information you provide when registering, subscribing to our newsletter, or contacting us. This may include your name, email address, and preferences.
Privacy.useText: We use your information to provide services, improve our platform, and communicate with you about events and updates.
Privacy.contactText: For privacy-related questions, contact us at privacy@eventapp.example.com.
